law.size: Exactly one font size on every surface, including the headline, which is heavier and blacker, never larger.
law.registers: Three inks by three weights (400 / 550 / 800): nine registers.
law.accent: Exactly one accent instance per viewport: the single action that matters now.
law.motion: Zero animation. State changes are instant, like a terminal.
law.layout: A single column (max 38em) in vast space. No rules, no cards, no boxes; whitespace is the only divider.
law.steering: Downstream projects may override exactly one token pair: --ae-accent / --ae-accent-dark. Everything else is the shared identity.
